query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_calls, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN cg.overallGrade = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as grade_a,
  SUM(CASE WHEN cg.overallGrade = 'B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as grade_b,
  SUM(CASE WHEN cg.overallGrade = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as grade_c,
  SUM(CASE WHEN cg.overallGrade = 'D' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as grade_d,
  SUM(CASE WHEN cg.overallGrade = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as grade_f
FROM calls c
LEFT JOIN call_grades cg ON c.id = cg.callId
WHERE c.tenantId = 540044;
